name: YouTube
description: Search, stream and import music from YouTube videos and playlists

configSchema.name: splitChapters
configSchema.label: Split chapters
configSchema.description: When adding a video with chapters, create one track per chapter instead of a single track

configSchema.name: downloadPath
configSchema.label: Download path
configSchema.description: Local directory where downloaded tracks will be saved (e.g. /home/user/Music)
